item.title: Descriptors & Decorators
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
DesôÙcripôÙtors are an amaôÙzing tool to haôÙve in our toolôÙboôÙx, as they coôÙme in handôÙy in many opporôÙtuôÙniôÙtieôÙs.

ProôÙbaôÙbly the best thing about desôÙcripôÙtorôÙs, is that they can imôÙproôÙve otheôÙr ôÙsoôÙluôÙtionôÙs. LeôÙt's see how we can wriôÙte beôÙtter deôÙcoôÙraôÙtorôÙs, by using desôÙcripôÙtorôÙs.

Leer mûÀsãÎ (quedan 5 minutos de lectura)

item.title: __wrapped__ in Python decorators
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
This is anoôÙther of the new inôÙteôÙresôÙting things that PyôÙthon 3 haôÙs. TiôÙme ago, it was soôÙmeôÙhow triôÙcky to woôÙrk wiôÙth deôÙcoôÙraôÙted funcôÙtionôÙs, beôÙcauôÙse the deôÙcoôÙraôÙtoôÙr ôÙreôÙplaôÙced the oriôÙgiôÙnal obôÙjecôÙt, and its beôÙhaôÙviour beôÙcaôÙme hard to reaôÙch.

Leer mûÀsãÎ (quedan 2 minutos de lectura)
